news.title: DSV AS (DSDVF) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Record EBIT and Strategic Progress Amid Challenges
news.summary: DSV AS (DSDVF) reports a robust quarter with record EBIT, strategic advancements in Schenker integration, and upgraded guidance, despite facing integration and market challenges.

news.title: DSV AS (DSDVY) Q2 2026: Everything You Need To Know Ahead Of Earnings
news.summary: This article first appeared on GuruFocus.  The consensus estimate for Q2 2026 revenue is $11.28 billion, and the earnings are expected to come in at $0.88 per share.  Over the past 90 days, revenue estimates for DSV AS (DSDVY) for the full year 2026 have increased from $44.68 billion to $45.23 billion, while for 2027, they have declined from $46.46 billion to $46.38 billion.

news.title: Strength Seen in DSV (DSDVY): Can Its 5.5% Jump Turn into More Strength?
news.summary: DSV (DSDVY) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
